## Type of Change

- [ ] `feat` — New feature
- [ ] `fix` — Bug fix
- [ ] `refactor` — Code change with no behavior change
- [ ] `chore` — Maintenance, dependencies, tooling
- [ ] `docs` — Documentation only
- [ ] `test` — Tests only
- [ ] `perf` — Performance improvement
- [ ] `ci` — CI/CD changes

## Checklist

### Code Quality
- [ ] I have self-reviewed every line of this diff
- [ ] No debug code, `console.log`, or commented-out code
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets, credentials, or magic strings
- [ ] Code follows the project's style (naming, structure, patterns)
- [ ] No unnecessary dependencies added

### Testing
- [ ] New logic has unit tests
- [ ] Integration tests updated or added for API changes
- [ ] All tests pass locally (`bun test` / `pytest` / `go test ./...`)

### Security
- [ ] No SQL/command injection vectors
- [ ] Input validation added for new inputs
- [ ] Authorization checks in place for new endpoints/actions
- [ ] No PII or sensitive data in logs

### Documentation
- [ ] `CLAUDE.md` updated if project conventions changed
- [ ] Architecture docs updated if design changed
- [ ] ADR created if a significant decision was made (`docs/architecture/decisions/`)
- [ ] Public API changes documented

### CI
- [ ] All CI checks pass
